### 3. Requested Data Streams
*Please check all restricted datasets required for your proposed analysis:*
- [ ] **Aim 1C (Human Movement):** Pre-transformation, absolute UTM/GPS tracking coordinates (i-GotU GT-600B).
- [ ] **Aim 1A/C (Serological Linkage):** Disaggregated human seroconversion outcomes (ELISA IgG/IgM) linked to precise household geolocations.
- [ ] **Aim 1B (High-Resolution Exposure Surfaces):** Un-blurred, absolute spatial coordinates of peridomestic agricultural storage and household structures.
- [ ] **Aim 1D (Rodent Trapping Grids):** Precise georeferenced coordinates of peridomestic and agricultural matrix trapping stations.
- [ ] **Other (Specify below):**
> [Specify here if applicable]

---

### 4. Methodological Justification
*Explain precisely why the publicly available, anonymised datasets (e.g., null-space affine transformed movement tracks, 1 km² rasterised risk layers, or LGA-aggregated serology) are scientifically insufficient for your proposed analytical pipeline.*
> [Insert justification here]

---

### 5. Ethical & Regulatory Compliance
*Access to identifiable or re-identifiable human spatial and biological data requires rigorous governance oversight.*

* **Institutional Review Board (IRB) / Research Ethics Committee Status:**
  - [ ] Approved (Attach or link approval letter below)
  - [ ] Under Review / Pending
  - [ ] Exemption Granted (Provide justification below)
* **IRB / Ethics Protocol Number:** 
* **Name of Overseeing Ethics Committee:** 

> [Provide additional ethics context or links to documentation here]

---

### 6. Data Governance & Security Pledge
*By submitting this request, the Lead Applicant explicitly acknowledges and agrees to the following mandatory conditions:*

- [ ] **No Re-identification:** I declare that no attempts will be made to re-identify individual participants, households, or precise village locations from the requested data streams.
- [ ] **Data Security:** All received datasets will be stored on secure, encrypted, access-controlled institutional servers. No data will be uploaded to public cloud storage, commercial generative AI platforms, or unencrypted portable drives.
- [ ] **No Redistribution:** Data will be utilised exclusively by the named investigators for the approved analytical scope. Datasets will not be shared, transferred, or sub-licensed to third parties.
- [ ] **Formal Agreement:** I understand that if this request is approved by the SCAPES Leadership Team, execution of a formal, legally binding Data Transfer Agreement (DTA) between Pennsylvania State University / consortium partners and my home institution is required prior to data transmission.
- [ ] **Consortium Attribution:** I agree to adhere to the SCAPES publication and authorship guidelines, ensuring appropriate citation of the protocol paper and collaborative attribution where substantive analytical support is provided.

---
*Upon submission, the SCAPES Leadership Team will review your application. Please allow up to 14 business days for initial triage and verification.*
